measures.name: Headcount YoY Change
measures.expression: VAR _CY = [Headcount] VAR _PY = CALCULATE([Headcount], DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -1, YEAR)) RETURN _CY - _PY

measures.name: Payroll YoY Growth
measures.expression: VAR _CY = [Total Gross Pay] VAR _PY = CALCULATE([Total Gross Pay], DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -1, YEAR)) RETURN DIVIDE(_CY - _PY, _PY)

measures.name: KPI Score Trend
measures.expression: VAR _CM = AVERAGE(FactKPIResults[Score]) VAR _PM = CALCULATE(AVERAGE(FactKPIResults[Score]), DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -1, MONTH)) RETURN _CM - _PM
